description: You are a VFR pilot airborne over the San Francisco Bay Area when your engine develops a rough-running problem. Identify a suitable emergency alternate airport within the Bay Area (such as KHAF, KSQL, KPAO, KLVK, KCCR, or KWVI) and build a direct diversion flight plan from KSFO to that alternate. Save the flight plan with the internal name EMER to the file EMER.csv.
